In the first seven phases, you learn every single thing that you've found that you need to know in order to successfully run a digital agency. You have the ability to comment below and ask any questions for anything that you didn't understand in order for us to be able to come in and immediately help you. If you're part of the mentor program, you're already receiving one-on-one counsel and group counsel in the student batches of five in order for you to be successful and hear directly from the source what you may need to do to overcome your current problems and circumstances. In this particular section, I want to give you guys rapid-fire statements and rapid-fire tips and tricks that are going to overcome little issues or give you a little hacks that get you to results faster. So in this particular video, we're going to cover some advanced marketing tricks. Advanced marketing trick number one, when you are advertising on Facebook and you boost a post, never use the button option when you're boosting. Advanced tip number two, when you are boosting content, be sure not to include any links inside of the top part of the Facebook post. You want to include all links inside of the comments. Rule number three is advanced marketing tips for your own agency. Personality brands have a four-time higher connectivity rate than businesses do in marketing. So if you market yourself and you market a positive personality in incredible environments with incredible people all the time, you are going to have a great ability to generate a ton of business if you consistently do it. You see, another tip you can do for advanced marketing besides just living your own lifestyle and having a positive mental outlook on things and showing positive results and process throughout your business is education. You see, if you become an educator or a teacher, you become an expert. As soon as you have the ability to master a particular section of whatever it is that you operate with as a digital agency, make that thing considerably a core product because you can teach on it. Teach all your content around it. Do webinars on it. Do different activities and different events where you speak on it. Become a master at that one thing and funnel business through that as your core product by educating first, then selling the product, then upselling all the other services you have. That'll make it easier for you if you have one foundational thing that you're great at to sell everything else that you have that isn't your core offers. That being said, another advanced marketing tip for you is when you are marketing on a reiterated, get it again, use video marketing for follow up, for messaging follow up, for LinkedIn messaging, Facebook Messenger follow up, and in person, get people to send you videos. If you go to an event and you dare hand out a business card in 2017, you're going to fall into the same premise that 95% of other people are when they are at events, being that they're not going to follow up with those that are at the event that is given a card. If people don't follow up anymore, you need to get contact information in real time. Get a phone number from somebody, quickly send over your contact card with all your information in it, and then send that person a photo of you. At the end of every event, do the due diligence for all the business cards you get and all the numbers you get to follow up with everybody. That's where a majority of your business will come from is in person events, meetups, and meetings. Always network and always create masterminds for yourself. One more advanced marketing trick is create an environment where you have a council or a table of people that you can go to that all are like-minded and other digital agency owners, which you can construct to successfully have an environment of other digital agency owners that can tell you their current strategies for marketing and success that are generating them clients' leads and results inside of their businesses. This has been a little quick buy rabbit session on advanced marketing tricks inside of phase number eight, the advanced tips section. I'll see you guys in the next video.
